message:
test(workflows): add FallbackReason Display and fallback plan builder tests

Add 5 tests covering previously untested areas:

- FallbackReason::Display: all 6 variant display strings verified
- FallbackReason serde+Display consistency: roundtrip preserves Display
- build_needs_human_auth_plan: resume step inclusion, omission logic
- build_failover_disabled_plan: config command in suggestions

Total handler tests: 152 (was 147).

Build: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-tansummit-target --no-default-features
All 152 pass (0.02s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
